overall.description: Cinematic third-person game footage depicting a character standing on a rocky cliff edge at night. The camera slowly orbits around the stationary character, revealing a vast night sky with clouds and stars, distant mountains, and the ocean below.

agents.ego_description: standing motionless on the cliff edge, silhouetted against the night sky while gazing out at the distant landscape

entered.detail: dark rocky outcrop where the character stands, dropping off sharply to the water below
silhouetted mountain peaks visible across the water in the distance
dark water visible below the cliff, reflecting minimal light
deep blue night sky filled with scattered clouds obscuring most stars

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a silhouetted game character standing on a rocky cliff edge at night. The camera slowly pans right, revealing a vast open landscape with distant mountains across dark water. The sky is filled with dramatic clouds, and the scene is lit only by ambient moonlight, creating a moody, atmospheric setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff overlook at night with coastal pine

events.description: character raises right hand to face in a brief gesture, then lowers it
stars become visible through the cloud cover as the sky clears slightly

agents.ego_description: raises hand to face in a contemplative gesture, then continues observing the night sky as the camera orbits

entered.detail: dark silhouette of a coniferous tree on the right side of the cliff

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its slow orbit around the character, the figure raises a hand to their face in a brief gesture. A pine tree enters the frame on the right, and the night sky gradually reveals stars through the cloud cover. The distant mountains shift from center to left as the panoramic view expands, maintaining the contemplative, isolated atmosphere of the cliff overlook.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, orbiting camera movement that transforms a moody, silhouetted cliffside view into an expansive, starry night panorama. It begins with a close focus on a silhouetted character standing on a rocky edge, panning right to reveal distant mountains across dark, moonlit waters under a heavy blanket of clouds. As the camera continues its orbit, the character briefly raises a hand to their face while a pine tree enters the frame from the right. The scene then opens further as the cloud cover thins to reveal a star-filled sky, shifting the distant mountains toward the left of the frame. This continuous motion finally expands the panoramic view, deepening the sense of isolation and contemplation atop the overlook.
